overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the character Geralt walking through the Mediterranean-inspired city of Beauclair. The character moves from a covered outdoor dining area through a sunlit plaza with a central fountain, then descends to a waterfront promenade as weather transitions from sunny to overcast, finally entering narrower cobblestone streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered outdoor dining terrace under pergola

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through an outdoor cafe area with tables and chairs on either side

notable_agents.action: seated at dining table eating and conversing

entered.detail: wooden lattice roof structure covered in flowering vines providing partial shade
black wooden trellis with climbing plants separating dining areas
wooden tables and chairs with white tablecloths arranged for dining
tree with bright red and pink blossoms in a large planter
multi-story Mediterranean-style buildings with orange facades and shuttered windows

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered outdoor dining terrace beneath a wooden pergola adorned with flowering vines. Tables with seated NPCs line the cobblestone path, while a lattice wall runs along the left side. Orange stucco buildings are visible in the background through the dappled sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open town square with central fountain

events.description: exits the covered pergola into the open sunlit plaza
character turns right to circle around the central fountain

agents.ego_description: walking around the central fountain in the plaza, surveying the surroundings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue dress walking across the plaza

entered.detail: circular stone fountain with central pillar and basin, surrounded by potted plants
wide open circular plaza with patterned cobblestone paving

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered terrace, the character enters a bright sunlit town square dominated by a central stone fountain. The camera circles the fountain while orange stucco buildings surround the plaza. The pergola structure falls behind as the character moves deeper into the open space.

events.description: weather transitions from sunny to overcast and stormy, sky darkens significantly

agents.ego_description: walking down the waterfront path toward the water with mountains visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: child in pink shirt running past the character toward the plaza

entered.detail: stone railing with decorative pillars separating the walkway from the water
large gothic castle with spires visible across the water on a hillside
ornate stone pillar with hanging lanterns and flower baskets

segments.scene_description: The character descends toward the waterfront along a cobblestone promenade lined with stone balustrades. The weather shifts dramatically from sunny to stormy overcast, darkening the sky. A distant castle looms across the water while the character passes decorative lantern posts and other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street between historic buildings

events.description: turns away from the waterfront into a narrower street between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through a narrow street, passing seated NPCs and guards

notable_agents.action: guard in orange and blue uniform standing watch near a building entrance

entered.detail: winding cobblestone path between tall stone buildings with arched doorways
tall historic structures with detailed stonework and balconies

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the waterfront, the character enters a narrower cobblestone street between tall historic buildings. The lighting becomes darker under the overcast sky. The distant castle remains visible to the left while the character passes guards and other NPCs along the winding path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a Mediterranean city that transforms from a sun-drenched terrace into a moody, overcast urban landscape. It begins beneath a wooden pergola adorned with flowering vines, moving past outdoor dining tables and orange stucco buildings in dappled sunlight. As the character emerges from the shade, the scene opens into a bright town square where the camera circles a central stone fountain before the pergola structure falls away. The path then descends along a cobblestone promenade toward the waterfront, where the lighting shifts dramatically from brilliant gold to a stormy, dark overcast as a distant castle looms across the water. Finally, the camera turns away from the coast to enter a narrow, winding street between tall historic buildings, passing guards under a heavy, darkened sky.
